app.title: FetchXML Builder Web
app.subtitle: Build queries for Microsoft Dataverse & Power Platform

validation.invalidAlias: Invalid alias: "{{alias}}". Must start with a letter or underscore and contain only letters, digits, or underscores.
validation.invalidDatasource: Invalid datasource value. Only "retained" is allowed.
validation.aggregateWithRetained: Aggregate queries cannot use Long Term Retention (retained) data.
validation.linkEntityWithRetained: link-entity cannot be used with Long Term Retention data.
validation.linkEntityAttributesRequired: link-entity must specify name, from and to attributes.
validation.linkEntityFilterLinkType: link-entity under a filter must have link-type: any, not any, all, or not all.
validation.linkEntityFilterNoAttributes: link-entity under a filter cannot return attributes.
validation.linkTypeOnlyInFilter: link-type any/not any/all/not all can only be used inside a filter.
validation.attributeUnderFilter: Attribute under filter is not allowed.
validation.aggregateAliasRequired: Aggregate attribute should always have an alias.
validation.aliasNotRecommended: Alias is not recommended for non-aggregate queries.
validation.filterEmpty: Filter should have at least one condition.
validation.operatorNotSupported: Operator "{{operator}}" is not supported by FetchXML.
validation.entitynameOnLinkEntity: Cannot specify entityname on a link-entity condition.
validation.orderAliasRequired: Order alias must be specified in aggregate queries.
validation.orderAttributeNotAllowed: Order attribute must NOT be specified in aggregate queries.
validation.linkEntityOrderLegacy: Sorting on a link-entity column triggers legacy paging.
validation.orderAttributeNotFound: Order attribute "{{attribute}}" not found in entity "{{entityName}}".
